BUG TITLE: Product page (Shop page 2) >> "Buy on the WordPress swag store!" button does not redirect to a working external page
ENVIRONMENT:
Browser: Google Chrome
Environment: WooCommerce Demo Site (staging)
URL: https://pams-store.42web.io
OS: Windows
STEPS TO REPRODUCE:
1. Navigate to shop page 2
2. Click Buy on the WordPress swag store! on the WordPress Pennant product
EXPECTED RESULT: User is redirected to a working external store page.
ACTUAL RESULT: Link is broken; external page is not accessible.

BUG TITLE: Product detail page >> Logo Collection have no Add to Cart button present
ENVIRONMENT:
Browser: Google Chrome
Environment: WooCommerce Demo Site (staging)
URL: https://pams-store.42web.io
OS: Windows
STEPS TO REPRODUCE:
1. Navigate to the Logo Collection product page
2. Set a quantity for any sub-product row (e.g. T-Shirt: 1)
3. Look for the add to cart button
EXPECTED RESULT: An Add to Cart button should be present below the grouped product table to add selected items to the cart.
ACTUAL RESULT: No Add to Cart button exists on the page. Selected quantities cannot be added to the cart.

BUG TITLE: Cart page >> Setting quantity field to 0 does not remove the product or show a validation message
ENVIRONMENT:
Browser: Google Chrome
Environment: WooCommerce Demo Site (staging)
URL: https://pams-store.42web.io
OS: Windows
STEPS TO REPRODUCE:
1. Add a product to the cart
2. On the cart page, clear the quantity field and enter 0
3. Press Tab or click outside the field
EXPECTED RESULT: Product should be removed from the cart, or a validation message should be displayed.
ACTUAL RESULT: Product remains in the cart with the original quantity unchanged.

BUG TITLE: Checkout page >> Country dropdown reverts to an earlier selected value instead of the last one after page reload
ENVIRONMENT:
Browser: Google Chrome
Environment: WooCommerce Demo Site (staging)
URL: https://pams-store.42web.io
OS: Windows
STEPS TO REPRODUCE:
1. Navigate to checkout
2. Select a country (e.g. Uganda), then select a state
3. Change the country to a different value (e.g. United States)
4. Reload the page
EXPECTED RESULT: Page should retain the most recently selected country (United States).
ACTUAL RESULT: Page reverts to an earlier selected country (Uganda).

BUG TITLE: Product listing page >> Add to cart and Select options buttons are not aligned across product cards
ENVIRONMENT:
Browser: Google Chrome
Environment: WooCommerce Demo Site (staging)
URL: https://pams-store.42web.io
OS: Windows

1. Navigate to the shop page
2. Compare button alignment across a row containing products with differing configurations (e.g. Album vs Beanie)

ACTUAL RESULT: Action buttons are misaligned across product cards; some cards show the buttons higher or lower than others, causing inconsistent layout.

BUG TITLE: Register form >> Email field shows incorrect error message referencing "username" instead of "email" when character limit is exceeded
ENVIRONMENT:
Browser: Google Chrome
Environment: WooCommerce Demo Site (staging)
URL: https://pams-store.42web.io
OS: Windows
STEPS TO REPRODUCE:
1. Navigate to /my-account/
2. Enter an email address exceeding 60 characters in the Register form
3. Submit the form
EXPECTED RESULT: Error message should appears saying the Email address should not be longer than 60 characters.
ACTUAL RESULT: Error message appears saying username may be longer than 60 characters.

BUG TITLE: Register form >> Password strength meter incorrectly rates whitespace-only password as Medium strength
ENVIRONMENT:
Browser: Google Chrome
Environment: WooCommerce Demo Site (staging)
URL: https://pams-store.42web.io
OS: Windows
STEPS TO REPRODUCE:
1. Navigate to /my-account/
2. In the Register form, enter " " (quotation marks with white spaces) into the Password field
EXPECTED RESULT: Password should be rejected or rated as Weak.
ACTUAL RESULT: Password is accepted and rated as Medium strength despite containing only whitespace.

BUG TITLE: Product detail page >> Quantity field does not block excessively large numbers like 9999999999
ENVIRONMENT:
Browser: Google Chrome
Environment: WooCommerce Demo Site (staging)
URL: https://pams-store.42web.io
OS: Windows
STEPS TO REPRODUCE:
1. Navigate to a product page (e.g. Beanie with Logo)
2. Enter 9999999999 into the quantity field
3. Click Add to Cart
EXPECTED RESULT: System should validate input against stock levels or a sensible maximum (e.g. 99) and reject or cap values exceeding it.
ACTUAL RESULT: System accepts the value without validation, producing an incorrect or unexpected order quantity.
